features: VELVET TOUCH REALISM: the reindeer Christmas ornament features realistic details and craft design, providing a realistic appearance that enhances festive presentations with its soft velvet texture, making it ideal for creating comfortable holiday decors in living rooms

Festive Christmas Deer - Designed in traditional holiday colors, this Christmas deer creates a warm Christmas feeling while amplifying the festive one, making it a great choice to instantly add a festive to any room or event.

Wide Application This Christmas reindeer works as a versatile decorative piece, blending perfectly with various spaces and providing aesthetic appeal for multiple rooms, creating warm and joyful atmospheres wherever it is placed in your home or workplace.

SOLID RESIN - Featuring a solid resin construction and durable finish, this Christmas reindeer decor effectively resists wear, while its soft texture provides a festive and comfortable touch, making it ideal for decorating homes, yards or event venues effortlessly.

COMPACT & VERSATILE - Designed with convenience in mind, these Christmas deer figurines can be effortlessly displayed anywhere from dining tables to entryway consoles, bringing warmth and seasonal to every corner of your living space.
description: Introducing the Christmas reindeer set, featuring two pieces of animal-inspired statues designed with aesthetic appeal in shades of red and green. These sculptures are perfect for adding a festive touch to your home decor. Display them on your fireplace, bedside table or living room to create a warm holiday vibe. Christmas reindeer also complements kitchen spaces or workplaces, enhancing their seasonal charm. Designed to blend seamlessly with different interior styles, these decorative items bring and festive wherever they are placed. Material: resin (flocking finish) Available colours: green, red Size: Approx. 12 x 4 x 20.5 cm/4.72 x 1.57 x 8.07 inches. Approx. 11 x 6.5 x 10.5 cm/4.33 x 2.56 x 4.13 inches. Note: Due to the light and screen setting difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures. Due to manual measurement, please allow 1-2 cm difference in size. Product List: 2 x Christmas Reindeer Decor
